name: Cafe Ice Magic
description: Vijayawada's most loved premium cafe serving delicious food, exotic ice creams, signature shakes, and hosting unforgettable celebrations since 2018.

location.address: Plot No. 42, NTR Circle Road, Patamata, Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh - 520010
location.landmark: Opposite NTR Circle, Next to HDFC Bank, Patamata
location.parking: Free parking available for 50+ vehicles in our dedicated lot. Valet service available on weekends.

birthday_packages.name: Sweet Celebration Package
birthday_packages.description: Perfect for intimate birthdays. Includes: reserved table decoration, birthday banner & balloons, 1 kg custom cake, 1 round of shakes/cold drinks for all guests, complimentary birthday song & polaroid photos

birthday_packages.name: Magic Birthday Package
birthday_packages.description: Our most popular package! Includes: premium venue decoration with LED lights, custom name backdrop, 2 kg designer cake, welcome drinks for all, 1 round of any milkshakes, dedicated birthday host, professional cake cutting ceremony

birthday_packages.name: Grand Ice Magic Package
birthday_packages.description: Go all out! Includes: exclusive section of cafe, premium theme decoration, 3 kg custom designer cake, welcome mocktails, unlimited ice cream scoops for 2 hours, DJ music (curated playlist), photo booth with props, dedicated event coordinator, return gifts setup area

birthday_packages.name: Royal Celebration Package
birthday_packages.description: The ultimate birthday experience! Full cafe buyout option available. Includes: entire cafe decoration, 4 kg premium 3-tier cake, welcome drinks + mocktails, unlimited food from selected menu for 3 hours, live DJ music, professional photographer (1 hour), Instagram-worthy setups, personalized return gifts

event_booking.description: We host corporate events, kitty parties, anniversaries, baby showers, farewell parties, and all celebrations! Our dedicated events team will make your occasion truly special.
event_booking.advance_notice: Minimum 3 days advance booking required. For large events (50+), 7 days notice preferred.
event_booking.corporate_events: Corporate lunch/dinner, team outings, product launches, client meetings — we have dedicated corporate packages.

table_reservation.policy: We accept table reservations for groups of 4 or more. Reservation holds for 15 minutes after booked time.
table_reservation.process: Call us at +91 98765 43210 or use this chat to reserve your table.
table_reservation.cancellation: Please cancel at least 2 hours in advance.

offers.name: Happy Hours
offers.description: 20% off on all shakes and ice creams

offers.name: Birthday Month Offer
offers.description: FREE birthday cake slice + 15% off your bill on your birthday month
offers.validity: Show Aadhaar/any ID with birth month

offers.name: Student Discount
offers.description: 15% off on all orders with valid student ID

wifi: Free high-speed WiFi available. Ask staff for password.
